name: Infortrend Technology, Inc.
summary: Infortrend Technology, Inc provides enterprise data storage solutions worldwide. The company offers EonStor CS, a shared storage solution to enterprises and businesses; EonStor GSa, a flash unified storage solution; EonStor GSc, a hybrid cloud storage appliance; EonStor GS, a unified storage integrating storage area network (SAN), network attached storage, and cloud services; EonStor GSe, a shared media storage for SMB; EonStor GSe Pro, a single controller storage solution; and M and E, and office shared storage solutions . It also provides EonStor DS, a SAN storage solution; EonServ, an integrated storage server solution; expansion enclosure for rackmount storage systems; and EonOne for GS and CS, a storage management tool. In addition, the company offers data services, including SSD Cache, a component that stores data so that future requests for the data can be served; automated storage tiering solutions; local/remote replication for data protections and backups; and Snapshot, which provides point-in-time copies of data for various applications, including backup, testing or development, information analysis, and data mining. Further, it offers thin provisioning technology to enhance storage utilization; intelligent drive recovery for RAID protections and data recoveries, and media scan; and network video recorders for surveillance deployment in offices. Additionally, the company provides storage solutions for virtualizations, hybrid cloud, artificial intelligence, private cloud, physical securities, backup and disaster recoveries, virtual desktop infrastructures, databases, and dockers, as well as high performance computing solutions. It serves security and surveillance, media and entertainments, education and academics, financial services, and healthcare industries, as well as the government and public sectors. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
